code:
import string

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errs: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errs = append_str(errs, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errs = append_str(errs, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errs = append_str(errs, "too-old")
  end
  errs
end

fn append_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = push_str(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  push_str(result, s)
end

fn push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = [s]
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = prepend_after(result, v, i)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  reorder(xs, s)
end

fn prepend_after(_ xs: List<String>, _ v: String, _ i: Int) -> List<String>
  xs
end

fn reorder(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      out = single_append(out, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  single_append(out, s)
end

fn single_append(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    [s]
  else if n == 1
    match xs.get(0)
    when Some(a)
      [a, s]
    when None
      [s]
    end
  else if n == 2
    match xs.get(0)
    when Some(a)
      match xs.get(1)
      when Some(b)
        [a, b, s]
      when None
        [a, s]
      end
    when None
      [s]
    end
  else
    match xs.get(0)
    when Some(a)
      match xs.get(1)
      when Some(b)
        match xs.get(2)
        when Some(c)
          [a, b, c, s]
        when None
          [a, b, s]
        end
      when None
        [a, s]
      end
    when None
      [s]
    end
  end
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let errs = validate(name, age)
  if errs.len() == 0
    println("ok")
  else
    mut msg = "errors="
    mut i = 0
    while i < errs.len()
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          msg = "#{msg}#{v}"
        else
          msg = "#{msg},#{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(msg)
  end
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
